nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: Darkness loosens slowly. Cold concrete presses against your cheek. Somewhere nearby, a damaged machine clicks without rhythm.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: Pain gathers behind your eyes. The air tastes of dust, burned wiring, and old rain.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: Where am I?

nodes.speaker: Empathy
nodes.text: Breathe first. You are hurt, but you are awake. That is enough for this moment.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: Three facts: you can breathe, you can move, and the room is not actively collapsing. Begin there.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: Those voices... are they mine?

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: A faint blue pulse reveals cracked tables, hanging cables, and a metal apparatus broken open on the floor.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The corridor beyond the room is narrow and wet. Broken lights hang above doors whose labels have peeled away.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: This was our facility. I know the shape of it. But it looks older than the memories.

nodes.speaker: Scepticism
nodes.text: Recognition is not proof. Compare what you remember with what the room can actually support.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: The device retains a future calibration. The newspaper was printed in 1919. Both cannot describe one ordinary moment.

nodes.speaker: Conscience
nodes.text: If you have entered another time, every careless act may reach people who never chose to bear its cost.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: Far beyond the exit, wheels rattle over stone. No electric traffic answers them. A clock bell sounds through the rain.

nodes.speaker: Memory
nodes.text: Paris... delegates after the Great War... a peace meant to hold. I cannot tell whether that is knowledge or destination.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: Then I decide from the evidence, not the fear.

nodes.speaker: Player
nodes.text: I was displaced into the past. The machine failed, and the timeline is no longer stable.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: Working conclusion accepted. Exact date and location remain unverified. Gather evidence before intervention.

nodes.speaker: Conscience
nodes.text: Understanding what happened is only the first duty. The next is to avoid making the damage worse.

nodes.speaker: Empathy
nodes.text: One step at a time. Survive the corridor. Find the date. Then face what comes after.

nodes.speaker: System
nodes.text: New objective: Survive. Establish the date. Repair the historical path.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: You move toward the rain, carrying five fractured voices and one conclusion strong enough to follow.
